textByHash.14ffc497bcccb8834e84d96ac6ad63a1c66c7096: Hey there. Here to do some fishing? It's a great place for it. Or are you looking to buy some fishing supplies?
textByHash.d7d9cbe10262bcf8960ffa6bdc9e30591b18e12d: Not so much out here, but I sell plenty of fish to merchants in the capital. If you buy any fish there, there's a good chance it came from me.
textByHash.ef75b7b9c20d9c7c829587f5e37665c91595851c: So anyway, looking to buy some fishing supplies?
